sentences.sentence: Learning theory is rooted in the work of Ivan Pavlov, the famous scientist who discover and documented the principles governing how animals (humans included) learn in the 1900s.
sentences.translation: 学习理论源于著名科学家伊万·巴甫洛夫的研究；他在20世纪发现并记录了支配动物（包括人类）学习方式的原理。

structure.text: Learning theory
is rooted in the work of Ivan Pavlov
the famous scientist
who discover and documented the principles
governing how animals (humans included) learn in the 1900s

difficult_points: who 修饰 scientist；governing... 又修饰 principles，形成嵌套后置修饰。
how animals... learn 是 governing 的宾语从句；humans included 是括号内独立补充。
原文 discover 与 documented 时态不一致，已保留。

sentences.sentence: Two basic kinds of learning or conditioning occur, one of which is famously known as the classical condition.
sentences.translation: 学习或条件作用有两种基本类型，其中一种就是著名的经典条件作用。

structure.text: Two basic kinds of learning or conditioning
occur
one of which is famously known as the classical condition

difficult_points: one of which 指两种类型中的一种，which 回指 kinds。
be known as 表示被称为；原文写 classical condition 而非通常的 conditioning，已保留。

sentences.sentence: Classical conditioning happens when an animal learns to associate a neutral stimulus(signal) with a stimulus that has intrinsic meaning based on how closely in time the two stimuli are presented.
sentences.translation: 当动物根据两个刺激在时间上出现得有多接近，学会把中性刺激（信号）与本身具有意义的刺激联系起来时，经典条件作用便会发生。

structure.text: Classical conditioning
happens
when an animal learns to associate a neutral stimulus(signal) with a stimulus
that has intrinsic meaning
based on how closely in time the two stimuli are presented

difficult_points: when 从句说明经典条件作用发生的条件；associate A with B 表示建立联结。
that 修饰第二个 stimulus；based on... 说明关联学习依据两个刺激的时间接近程度。
原文 stimulus 与括号之间无空格，已保留。

sentences.sentence: The classic example of classical conditioning is a dog's ability to associate the sound of a bell (something that originally has no meaning to the dog) with the presentation of food (something that has a lot of meaning for the dog) a few moments later.
sentences.translation: 经典条件作用的典型例子，是狗能把铃声（原本对狗毫无意义）与片刻后食物的出现（对狗非常有意义）联系起来。

structure.text: The classic example of classical conditioning
is
a dog's ability
to associate the sound of a bell (something that originally has no meaning to the dog) with the presentation of food (something that has a lot of meaning for the dog) a few moments later

difficult_points: to associate... 修饰 ability，内部是 associate A with B 结构。
两个括号中的 something 分别同位解释铃声和食物，并各带 that 定语从句。
a few moments later 修饰食物出现的时间。

sentences.sentence: Dogs are able to learn the association between bell and food, and will salivate immediately after hearing the bell once this connection has been made.
sentences.translation: 狗能够学会铃声与食物之间的关联；这种联系一旦建立，它们听到铃声后便会立即分泌唾液。

structure.text: Dogs
are able to learn the association between bell and food
and will salivate immediately after hearing the bell
once this connection has been made

difficult_points: are able to learn 与 will salivate 共用主语 Dogs。
after 后接 hearing 动名词；once 从句表示联系一旦建立，使用现在完成时被动。

expressions.text: once this connection has been made

sentences.sentence: Years of learning research have led to the creation of a highly precise learning theory that can be used to understand and predict how and under what circumstances most any animal will learn, including human beings, and eventually help people figure out how to change their behaviors.
sentences.translation: 多年的学习研究促成了一套高度精确的学习理论；它可用于理解和预测几乎任何动物（包括人类）会如何学习、在何种情况下学习，并最终帮助人们弄清如何改变行为。

structure.text: Years of learning research
have led to the creation of a highly precise learning theory
that can be used to understand and predict
how and under what circumstances most any animal will learn
including human beings
and eventually help people figure out how to change their behaviors

difficult_points: that 修饰 theory，并连接 can be used 与 help 两个作用。
how 与 under what circumstances 并列引导 predict 的宾语内容。
help people figure out... 是复合宾语；most any 是非正式表达，意为几乎任何。

sentences.sentence: Role models are a popular notion for guiding child development, but in recent years very interesting research has been done on learning by example in other animals.
sentences.translation: 榜样是引导儿童发展的常见理念，但近年来，人们也对其他动物通过示范学习开展了非常有趣的研究。

structure.text: Role models are a popular notion for guiding child development
but in recent years
very interesting research
has been done on learning by example in other animals

difficult_points: but 对比人类儿童榜样理念与动物示范学习研究。
learning by example 是介词 on 的宾语，表示通过观察范例学习。

sentences.sentence: If the subject of animal learning is taught very much in terms of classical or operant conditioning, it places too much emphasis on how we allow animals to learn and not enough on how they are equipped to learn.
sentences.translation: 如果动物学习这一主题主要以经典条件作用或操作性条件作用来讲授，就会过度强调我们如何让动物学习，而没有充分重视动物天生如何具备学习能力。

structure.text: If the subject of animal learning is taught very much in terms of classical or operant conditioning
it
places too much emphasis on how we allow animals to learn
and not enough on how they are equipped to learn

difficult_points: If 从句使用被动语态；主句 it 回指这种教学方式。
too much... and not enough... 形成对称对比，后半省略 places emphasis。
两个 how 从句分别作介词 on 的宾语；they 指 animals。

sentences.sentence: To teach a course of mine I have been dipping profitably into a very interesting and accessible compilation of papers on social learning in mammals, including chimps and human children, edited by Heyes and Galef.
sentences.translation: 为了教授我的一门课程，我一直受益匪浅地研读一本有趣且易懂的论文集，内容涉及包括黑猩猩和人类儿童在内的哺乳动物社会学习，由海耶斯和加莱夫编辑。

structure.text: To teach a course of mine
I
have been dipping profitably into
a very interesting and accessible compilation of papers on social learning in mammals
including chimps and human children
edited by Heyes and Galef

difficult_points: 句首不定式表示研读论文集的目的；have been dipping into 表示持续查阅。
including... 修饰 mammals，edited... 修饰 compilation。

sentences.sentence: The research reported in one paper started with a school field trip to Israel to a pine forest where many pine cones were discovered, stripped to the central core.
sentences.translation: 一篇论文所报告的研究始于一次学校赴以色列松林的实地考察；在那里，人们发现许多松果已被剥得只剩中央果轴。

structure.text: The research
reported in one paper
started with a school field trip to Israel to a pine forest
where many pine cones were discovered
stripped to the central core

difficult_points: reported... 修饰 research；where 修饰 pine forest。
stripped... 补充 pine cones 被发现时的状态，表示外层鳞片已被剥除。

expressions.text: be stripped to the central core

sentences.sentence: So the investigation started with no weighty theoretical intent, but was directed at finding out what was eating the nutritious pine seeds and how they managed to get them out of the cones.
sentences.translation: 因此，这项调查起初并没有宏大的理论意图，而只是要查明什么动物在吃营养丰富的松子，以及它们如何把松子从松果中取出。

structure.text: So the investigation
started with no weighty theoretical intent
but was directed at finding out
what was eating the nutritious pine seeds
and how they managed to get them out of the cones

difficult_points: but 对比没有理论野心与具体调查目标；be directed at 后接动名词。
what 与 how 引导并列宾语从句；how 从句中的 they 指未知动物，them 指 pine seeds。

sentences.sentence: The culprit proved to be the versatile and athletic black rat (Rattus) and the technique was to bite each cone scale off at its base, in sequence from base to tip following the spiral growth pattern of the cone.
sentences.translation: 罪魁祸首原来是灵活而敏捷的黑鼠（Rattus）；它采用的方法是从每片松果鳞片的基部咬下，并沿松果螺旋生长的顺序从底部一直剥到顶端。

structure.text: The culprit proved to be the versatile and athletic black rat (Rattus)
and the technique
was
to bite each cone scale off at its base
in sequence from base to tip
following the spiral growth pattern of the cone

difficult_points: prove to be 表示最终查明是；and 后转而说明剥取技术。
bite A off at its base 表示从基部咬断鳞片；following... 说明动作遵循螺旋排列。

expressions.text: in sequence from base to tip

sentences.sentence: Urban black rats were found to lack the skill and were unable to learn it even if housed with experiences cone strippers.
sentences.translation: 研究发现，城市黑鼠缺乏这种技能；即使与有剥松果经验的同类关在一起，它们也学不会。

structure.text: Urban black rats
were found to lack the skill
and were unable to learn it
even if housed with experiences cone strippers

difficult_points: were found to 是被动报告结构；it 回指剥松果技能。
even if housed... 省略 they were；源文 experiences 疑为 experienced，但已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: However, infants of urban mothers cross fostered to stripper mothers acquired the skill, whereas infants of stripper mothers fostered by an urban mother could not.
sentences.translation: 然而，由城市鼠母亲所生、交给会剥松果的母鼠养育的幼鼠学会了这项技能；相反，会剥松果母鼠所生、由城市母鼠养育的幼鼠却学不会。

structure.text: However
infants of urban mothers
cross fostered to stripper mothers
acquired the skill
whereas infants of stripper mothers fostered by an urban mother could not

difficult_points: cross fostered... 修饰第一组 infants，表示跨母鼠寄养。
whereas 引出反向实验组；could not 后省略 acquire the skill。

sentences.sentence: Clearly the skill had to be learned from the mother.
sentences.translation: 显然，这项技能必须从母鼠那里学会。

structure.text: Clearly
the skill
had to be learned from the mother

difficult_points: had to be learned 是情态意义加被动语态，说明技能并非天生。
from the mother 指学习来源，而非遗传来源。

sentences.sentence: Further elegant experiments showed that naive adults could develop the skill if they were provided with cones from which the first complete spiral of scales had been removed, rather like our new photocopier which you can word out how to use once someone has shown you how to switch it on.
sentences.translation: 进一步设计精巧的实验表明，如果给没有经验的成年鼠提供已剥去第一整圈鳞片的松果，它们就能发展出这项技能；这很像一台新复印机，只要有人先示范如何开机，你就能摸索出使用方法。

structure.text: Further elegant experiments
showed
that naive adults could develop the skill
if they were provided with cones
from which the first complete spiral of scales had been removed
rather like our new photocopier which you can word out how to use once someone has shown you how to switch it on

difficult_points: that 宾语从句内含 if 条件句；from which 修饰 cones，表示鳞片从松果上被剥除。
which 修饰 photocopier；once 引导时间条件从句，其中 how to switch it on 作 shown 的内容。
源文 word out 疑为 work out，已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: In case of rats, the youngsters take cones away from the mother when she is still feeding on them, allowing them to acquire the complete stripping skill.
sentences.translation: 在黑鼠的情况中，幼鼠会在母鼠仍在取食松果时把松果拿走，从而学会完整的剥取技能。

structure.text: In case of rats
the youngsters
take cones away from the mother
when she is still feeding on them
allowing them to acquire the complete stripping skill

difficult_points: she 指 mother，when 从句说明幼鼠拿走松果时母鼠仍在操作。
allowing... 表示上述行为带来的学习结果，其中 them 指 youngsters。

sentences.sentence: A good example of adaptive bearing we might conclude, but let's see the economies.
sentences.translation: 我们或许会认定这是适应性行为的好例子，不过还要看看它是否划算。

structure.text: A good example of adaptive bearing
we might conclude
but let's see the economies

difficult_points: 前半是省略式表达，可理解为 we might conclude it is a good example...。
the economies 指这种觅食方式的能量成本收益；源文 bearing 疑为 behavior，已保留。

sentences.sentence: This was determined by measuring oxygen uptake of a rat stripping a cone in a metabolic chamber to calculate energetic cost and comparing it with the benefit of the pine seeds measured by calorimeter.
sentences.translation: 研究者通过测量黑鼠在代谢室中剥松果时的耗氧量来计算能量成本，并将其与量热计测得的松子收益比较，由此确定其经济性。

structure.text: This
was determined
by measuring oxygen uptake of a rat stripping a cone in a metabolic chamber
to calculate energetic cost
and comparing it with the benefit of the pine seeds
measured by calorimeter

difficult_points: by 后 measuring 与 comparing 并列，说明评估方法。
stripping... 修饰 rat；it 指 energetic cost；measured... 修饰 benefit。

sentences.sentence: The cost proved to be less than 10% of the energetic value of the cone.
sentences.translation: 结果表明，这一成本不到松果能量价值的10%。

structure.text: The cost
proved to be
less than 10% of the energetic value of the cone

difficult_points: prove to be 表示测量后显示结果为某值。
less than 10% of... 说明投入远小于食物带来的能量收益。

sentences.sentence: An acceptable profit margin.
sentences.translation: 这是可以接受的“利润率”。

structure.text: An acceptable profit margin

difficult_points: 这是无谓语的名词短语，承接上一句对成本收益比的评价。
profit margin 是经济学比喻，用来描述获得松子的净能量收益。

sentences.sentence: A paper in 1996 Animal Behavior by Bednekoff and Balda provides a different view of the adaptiveness of social learning.
sentences.translation: 贝德内科夫和巴尔达发表于1996年《动物行为》的一篇论文，对社会学习的适应性提出了不同看法。

structure.text: A paper in 1996 Animal Behavior by Bednekoff and Balda
provides
a different view of the adaptiveness of social learning

difficult_points: in 1996 Animal Behavior 压缩表达发表年份和期刊，by... 表示作者。
adaptiveness 指某种行为是否具有适应和生存价值。

sentences.sentence: It concerns the seed catching behavior of Clark's nutcracker(Nucifraga Columbiana) and the Mexican jay (Aphelocoma ultramarine).
sentences.translation: 论文讨论克拉克星鸦（Nucifraga Columbiana）和墨西哥丛鸦（Aphelocoma ultramarine）的种子贮藏行为。

structure.text: It
concerns
the seed catching behavior of Clark's nutcracker(Nucifraga Columbiana) and the Mexican jay (Aphelocoma ultramarine)

difficult_points: It 回指上一句的 paper；concern 表示论文涉及某主题。
两个括号给出物种学名；原文 nutcracker 与括号间无空格。

sentences.sentence: The former is a specialist, catching 30,000 or so seeds in scattered locations that it will recover over the months of winter, the Mexican jay will also cache food but is much less dependent upon this than the nutcracker.
sentences.translation: 前者是高度专门化的贮食者，会把约3万颗种子藏在分散地点，并在冬季数月中取回；墨西哥丛鸦也会贮藏食物，但对这种行为的依赖远低于星鸦。

structure.text: The former is a specialist
catching 30,000 or so seeds in scattered locations
that it will recover over the months of winter
the Mexican jay will also cache food
but is much less dependent upon this than the nutcracker

difficult_points: The former 指 Clark's nutcracker；catching 在语境中实际指储藏种子。
that 修饰 seeds，it 回指 nutcracker；this 回指 cache food 这一行为。
原文用逗号直接连接两个独立分句，属于 comma splice，已保留。

sentences.sentence: The two species also differ in their social structure, the nutcracker being rather solitary while the jay forages in social groups.
sentences.translation: 这两个物种的社会结构也不同：星鸦相当独居，而丛鸦则成群觅食。

structure.text: The two species
also differ in their social structure
the nutcracker being rather solitary
while the jay forages in social groups

difficult_points: 逗号后 the nutcracker being... 是独立主格，具体解释社会结构差异。
while 对比星鸦独居与丛鸦群体觅食。

sentences.sentence: The experiment is to discover not just whether a bird can remember where it hid a seed but also if it can remember where it saw another bird hide a seed.
sentences.translation: 实验不仅要查明鸟能否记住自己把种子藏在哪里，还要查明它能否记住曾看到另一只鸟把种子藏在哪里。

structure.text: The experiment
is
to discover
not just whether a bird can remember where it hid a seed
but also if it can remember where it saw another bird hide a seed

difficult_points: not just... but also... 连接 whether 与 if 两个间接疑问从句。
两个 remember 后各含 where 从句；see + 宾语 + 动词原形表示看见完整动作。

sentences.sentence: The design is slightly comical with a cacher bird wandering about a room with lots of holes in the floor hiding food in some of the holes, while watched by an observer bird perched in a cage.
sentences.translation: 实验设计略显滑稽：一只贮藏鸟在满是地洞的房间里走来走去，把食物藏进其中一些洞里，同时一只栖在笼中的观察鸟注视着它。

structure.text: The design
is slightly comical
with a cacher bird wandering about a room with lots of holes in the floor
hiding food in some of the holes
while watched by an observer bird
perched in a cage

difficult_points: with + bird + wandering 构成独立结构，描绘实验场景。
hiding 的逻辑主语是 cacher bird；while watched 省略 it is。
perched... 修饰 observer bird，而非 cacher bird。

sentences.sentence: Two days later cachers and observers are tested for their discovery rate against an estimated random performance.
sentences.translation: 两天后，研究者测试贮藏鸟和观察鸟的发现率，并与估算的随机表现进行比较。

structure.text: Two days later
cachers and observers
are tested
for their discovery rate
against an estimated random performance

difficult_points: are tested 是被动语态，for 引出测量指标 discovery rate。
against 表示测试结果以估算的随机水平为比较基准。

expressions.meaning_zh: 与估算的随机表现比较

sentences.sentence: In the role of cacher, not only nutcracker but also the less specialized jay performed above chance; more surprisingly, however, jay observers were as successful as jay cachers whereas nutcracker observers did no better than chance.
sentences.translation: 作为贮藏者，不仅星鸦，专门化程度较低的丛鸦表现也高于随机水平；然而更令人意外的是，丛鸦观察者与丛鸦贮藏者同样成功，而星鸦观察者的表现并不优于随机水平。

structure.text: In the role of cacher
not only nutcracker but also the less specialized jay
performed above chance
more surprisingly, however, jay observers were as successful as jay cachers
whereas nutcracker observers did no better than chance

difficult_points: not only... but also... 连接两个主语；above chance 表示超过随机概率。
as successful as 构成同级比较；whereas 对比两物种观察者。
did no better than chance 表示并未高于随机水平。

sentences.sentence: It seems that, whereas the nutcracker is highly adapted at remembering where it hid its own seeds, the social living Mexican jay is more adept at remembering, and so exploiting, the caches of others.
sentences.translation: 看起来，星鸦高度适应于记住自己把种子藏在哪里，而群居的墨西哥丛鸦则更擅长记住并利用其他鸟的贮藏点。

structure.text: It
seems
that, whereas the nutcracker is highly adapted at remembering where it hid its own seeds
the social living Mexican jay is more adept at remembering, and so exploiting, the caches of others

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语；其中 whereas 引出物种对比。
where 引导 remembering 的宾语从句；it 指 nutcracker。
remembering 与 exploiting 并列作 at 的宾语，so 表示记住后便能利用。
